summary: Recipe drives a real chart-render path (prime perps -> navigate BTC market -> wait chart) and pairs visual + internal-probe evidence per AC. AC1 proven by combined Intl probe (tz=Asia/Hong_Kong, hourCycle=h23) + screenshot of BTC chart x-axis showing local 20:00/21:00/22:00. AC3/AC4 proven by Intl probes (year=2025, month=Mar) on the home target. AC5 + AC6 date-prefix branch fall back to the comprehensive jest test suite (36 passing tests, two locales en-US/de-DE plus Czech ICU patch coverage). AC2 crosshair was attempted but synthetic MouseEvent('mousemove') does not trigger lightweight-charts' internal pointer pipeline; reverted to unit-test proof of the crosshair formatter wiring + locale propagation.

ac_coverage.reason: Probe + screenshot prove HK-local x-axis labels, not UTC.
Synthetic mouse event did not trigger canvas crosshair tooltip; fallback to unit tests + code-review of localization.timeFormatter wiring.
In-page Intl probe yields abbreviated month 'Mar'.
DayOfMonth ticks require multi-day visible range; default 5m view shows Time only. Unit-test fallback covers the branch.
24h format proven visually (20:00/21:00/22:0…, no AM/PM); date-prefix branch covered by unit tests for non-today FIXED_DATE.

forbidden_patterns.wait_gt_500ms_used_as_assertion: none — 2500ms setup-wait-render is chart hydration, not polling
forbidden_patterns.missing_screenshot_for_visual_claim: none for AC1; AC2 attempted but lib didn't bind

issues.message: Recipe-issues auto-review captured 1 pre-existing React 'setState on unmounted component' warning in PerpsView during navigation. Not caused by the formatter PR (pure utility change).

PR description example for AC5 day ticks is '3/15' (numeric M/D) but implementation returns 'Mar 15' (locale-native short month + numeric day). Mobile mirrors numeric M/D. Documentation drift, not a functional bug.

better_version_guidance: AC2 crosshair: programmatically zoom into a candle and call lightweight-charts' chart.subscribeCrosshairMove + chart.timeScale().getVisibleRange() via a window-exposed handle, then assert the crosshair tooltip text node directly rather than relying on synthetic mouse events.

AC5/AC6 date-prefix: switch to a 1D candle period (already in CandlePeriod enum) so the visible range spans multiple days and DayOfMonth + non-today Time ticks render. Add an `ac5-press-1d-period` node calling press on `[data-testid="chart-period-1D"]` (verify the testID exists in the period selector) before screenshotting.
Add a midnight-edge unit test (`new Date('2025-01-01T00:00:00Z')` formatted with userTimezone=UTC) to lock in the `hourCycle=h23` resolution and rebut the cursor-bot 24:00 false positive.
Consider parameterizing the recipe `--testnet`/`--account` so the test can run on a fixture with deterministic candle data instead of live HL data.
